title: Sezary syndrome
body_html:
Sezary syndrome is a type of T-cell cutaenous lymphoma.

Features
  • pruritus
  • erythroderma typically affecting the palms, soles and face
  • atypical T cells
  • lymphadenopathy
  • hepatosplenomegaly
